articles.title: Coupled Aero-Hydro-Elastic Response Analysis of 16 MW Semi-Submersible and TLP Floating Wind Turbines
articles.snippet: This study investigates the dynamic performance characteristics of 16 MW-class floating wind turbines supported by semi-submersible and tension leg platform (TLP) concepts, with the aim of providing guidance for platform selection. High-fidelity coupled aero-hydro-servo-elastic models were developed in OpenFAST for both floating platform configurations. Dynamic simulations were carried out under operational conditions for five wind–wave inflow directions with aligned environmental loading. The responses of the floating systems were comprehensively evaluated in terms of platform six-degree-of-freedom motions, tower structural behavior, blade aeroelastic loads, and aerodynamic performance. The results show that the TLP configuration provides enhanced hydrodynamic stability, reduced platform motions, and improved aerodynamic efficiency compared with the semi-submersible platform. In contrast, the semi-submersible configuration exhibits lower aeroelastic loading levels. Furthermore, platform-induced hydrodynamic excitations significantly amplify the elastic responses of both the tower and blades, leading to noticeable variations in aerodynamic performance. These findings provide useful insights into the design and selection of next-generation large-scale floating wind turbine platforms.
articles.source: Journal of Marine Science and Engineering

evidence.journal: Journal of Marine Science and Engineering

reliability.label: 高可靠
factors: 发表在Journal of Marine Science and Engineering

articles.titleZh: 16 MW半潜式与张力腿式浮式风机耦合气动-水动-弹性响应分析
articles.summary: 本研究针对16 MW级浮式风机，采用半潜式与张力腿平台（TLP）两种概念，基于OpenFAST建立高保真耦合气动-水动-伺服-弹性模型，在五种风浪入流方向下进行动态仿真。评估了平台六自由度运动、塔筒结构行为、叶片气弹载荷及气动性能。结果表明TLP配置提供更好的水动稳定性和气动效率，而半潜式配置气弹载荷较低。平台水动激励显著放大塔筒和叶片的弹性响应，导致气动性能变化。该研究为下一代大型浮式风机平台设计选择提供参考。
keyPoints: 对比了半潜式与TLP两种浮式基础在16 MW风机下的动态响应
使用OpenFAST进行高保真耦合仿真
TLP平台运动更小、气动效率更高
半潜式平台气弹载荷更低
平台水动激励放大塔筒和叶片弹性响应
articles.engineeringImpact: 对大型浮式风机平台选型具有指导意义：TLP适用于对稳定性要求高的场景，半潜式适用于对载荷敏感的设计。平台水动激励对结构弹性响应的影响需在设计中重点考虑。

paperDetails.objective: 研究16 MW级半潜式和TLP浮式风机的动态性能，为平台选型提供指导
paperDetails.methods: 基于OpenFAST建立高保真耦合气动-水动-伺服-弹性模型，进行动态仿真
paperDetails.testObject: 16 MW浮式风机，半潜式和TLP两种平台
paperDetails.operatingConditions: 五种风浪入流方向，环境载荷对齐
limitations: 未提及具体风速、波高范围

articles.title: Identification of Roll Defect or Damage Based on Rayleigh Waves and Deep Convolutional Neural Network Models
articles.snippet: It is important to detect the damage in the rollers and repair them since the damage to the rollers has a negative impact on the quality of the rolled products. Identifying the types of damage helps determine the repair process and normal production work. Ultrasonic testing technology has the advantages of large detection depth, accurate defect localization, low cost, convenient use, fast speed, and harmlessness to the human body. In order to improve the intelligence of ultrasonic detection for identifying damages in rollers, this article proposes a deep learning classification method of damages based on Rayleigh wave signals and power spectrum images with specific sampling rate, automatic identification of four common types of damages (void, hole, crack, and adhesion) is achieved by establishing end-to-end learning models for one-dimensional (1D) and two-dimensional (2D) data. Firstly, an organic glass inclined block and a clamping device were designed. In the experiment, time-domain signals were received on the right side of the damaged sample, and signal data sets were established for signals with different sampling rates. Then, the power spectrum image data sets were established after a short-time Fourier transform was performed. Next, a damage detection model is established based on a deep learning framework, which includes ResNet, GoogLeNet, DenseNet, and AlexNet with 1D and 2D convolutional channels to extract signal features for classifying damage. Finally, the performances of DenseNet models with different structures and depths are compared based on key indicators such as accuracy and training time. The experiment demonstrates that under high sampling rate conditions, using the power spectrum image of Rayleigh waves as data input yields better results than directly using Rayleigh wave signals. Moreover, for the power spectrum images of 0.5 MS/s Rayleigh waves, using ResNet-18 to establish a deep learning model can achieve high accuracy and shorter training
articles.titleZh: 基于瑞利波和深度卷积神经网络模型的轧辊缺陷或损伤识别
articles.summary: 针对轧辊损伤影响产品质量的问题，提出基于瑞利波信号和功率谱图像的深度学习分类方法。设计了有机玻璃斜块和夹持装置，采集不同采样率下的时域信号，经短时傅里叶变换得到功率谱图像。建立基于ResNet、GoogLeNet、DenseNet、AlexNet的一维和二维卷积通道的损伤检测模型，自动识别空洞、孔洞、裂纹和粘附四种损伤类型。实验表明高采样率下使用功率谱图像效果优于直接使用信号，0.5 MS/s采样率下ResNet-18模型精度高且训练时间短。
keyPoints: 使用瑞利波信号和功率谱图像作为输入
识别四种损伤类型：空洞、孔洞、裂纹、粘附
比较了多种深度学习模型（ResNet、GoogLeNet等）
高采样率下功率谱图像优于原始信号
0.5 MS/s采样率下ResNet-18表现最佳
articles.engineeringImpact: 为轧辊损伤的智能超声检测提供了高效分类方法，可辅助确定修复工艺，提高检测自动化水平。

paperDetails.objective: 提高轧辊损伤超声检测的智能化水平，自动识别损伤类型
paperDetails.methods: 设计有机玻璃斜块和夹持装置，采集瑞利波信号，建立功率谱图像，使用深度学习模型分类
paperDetails.testObject: 带有四种损伤（空洞、孔洞、裂纹、粘附）的轧辊样品

quantitativeFindings.comparison: 高采样率优于低采样率
quantitativeFindings.evidence: 实验表明高采样率下功率谱图像效果更好

limitations: 未提及实际轧辊工况下的验证

articles.title: Influence of the inflow conditions on the dynamics of a floating wind turbine wake under harmonic surge motion
articles.snippet: Abstract. Floating offshore wind turbines (FOWTs) are projected to undergo substantial expansion in the coming decades. However, the high compliance of their floating foundations, coupled with aerodynamic, hydrodynamic and mooring forces, leads to complex platform motions that make it difficult to predict their wake dynamics. The vortex ring structure produced during surge motion has been the subject of study for nearly a decade now but there are still many features to bring to light. As most studies have been under idealised uniform flow, there is little knowledge on how this structure behaves under atmospheric boundary layer (ABL) flow. In this work, the authors propose to study this structure under three different inflow conditions: laminar and low-turbulence no-shear flows and ABL flow. Large eddy simulations are carried out in combination with an actuator disc (AD) as a wind turbine model, with a focus on surge motion and a Strouhal number ranging between 0 and 0.47. The velocity values are extracted at a vertical plane parallel to the AD axis, which is subsequently analysed by means of proper orthogonal decomposition (POD) and phase averaging. In the POD analysis, vortex ring structures are identified under all inflow conditions, though their energy decreases as turbulence increases. Additionally, a dependence of energy on frequency is observed for low-turbulence no-shear and ABL flows, with the maximum energy occurring at Strouhal numbers 0.30 and 0.32, respectively. Furthermore, vertical meandering is detected in both cases. In low-turbulence no-shear flow, meandering and vortex rings act as decoupled phenomena. Replicating the analysis on a horizontal plane at hub height, it is observed that lateral meandering is uniformly intense under this inflow condition. Conversely, under ABL conditions, the surge motion interacts with the turbulent shear flow to actively induce a coupled vertical meandering. Vertical and lateral meandering in ABL conditions rely on en
articles.titleZh: 入流条件对谐波纵摇运动下浮式风机尾流动力学的影响
articles.summary: 浮式风机基础运动导致复杂尾流动力学，特别是纵摇运动产生的涡环结构。本文通过大涡模拟结合致动盘模型，研究层流、低湍流无剪切流和大气边界层（ABL）三种入流条件下，纵摇运动（Strouhal数0-0.47）对尾流的影响。使用本征正交分解（POD）和相位平均分析垂直平面速度场。发现所有入流条件下均存在涡环结构，但能量随湍流增加而降低。低湍流无剪切流和ABL流中能量在Strouhal数0.30和0.32处最大。垂直尾迹摆动在两种流中均存在，但机制不同：低湍流中摆动与涡环解耦，ABL中纵摇运动与湍流剪切耦合诱发垂直摆动。
keyPoints: 研究了三种入流条件（层流、低湍流无剪切、ABL）下浮式风机尾流
纵摇运动Strouhal数范围0-0.47

articles.title: Sensitivity analysis of key parameters for full-blade icing of wind turbines during rotation
articles.snippet: Blade icing critically constrains the efficiency and safety of wind turbines in cold and offshore regions, yet the spatial characteristics of full-blade icing under rotation, the parametric sensitivity of icing-induced aerodynamic degradation, and the mechanism of leeward icing remain insufficiently understood. This study develops a numerical framework coupling Fluent with FENSAP-ICE, in which Moving Reference Frame and dynamic-meshing techniques enable three-dimensional rotating simulations of airflow, droplet impingement, water-film migration, phase-change icing, and aerodynamic evaluation. At −10°C, rotational speed, inflow velocity, liquid water content (LWC), and median volume diameter (MVD) are varied parametrically, and response surface methodology quantifies spanwise sensitivities of icing and lift-to-drag ratio degradation. Wind velocity governs aerodynamic deterioration most strongly near the blade tip, with LWC secondary, whereas LWC dominates at mid-span, where wind velocity and droplet size show comparable secondary significance, indicating pronounced rotation-induced radial differences. Leeward icing stems mainly from windward water films transported into the leeward low-pressure separation zone by aerodynamic shear, centrifugal force, and gravity, rather than direct droplet impingement, and intensifies with larger droplets. Icing reduces the tip lift-to-drag ratio by up to 80% and shifts the optimal angle of attack, informing ice warning, zonal anti-/de-icing design, and operational control.
articles.titleZh: 旋转过程中风机叶片全覆冰关键参数敏感性分析
articles.summary: 针对旋转状态下叶片全覆冰空间特性及气动退化参数敏感性不足的问题，建立了Fluent与FENSAP-ICE耦合数值框架，采用移动参考系和动网格技术模拟三维旋转气流、水滴撞击、水膜迁移、相变结冰及气动评估。在-10°C下参数化转速、来流速度、液态水含量和平均体积直径，用响应面法量化展向敏感性和升阻比退化。结果表明：风速在叶尖主导气动退化，液态水含量次之；液态水含量在中部主导，风速和粒径次之。背风面结冰主要源于迎风面水膜被气动剪切、离心力和重力输运至低压分离区。结冰使叶尖升阻比降低高达80%，并改变最佳攻角。
keyPoints: 采用Fluent与FENSAP-ICE耦合框架进行三维旋转结冰模拟
响应面法量化了展向参数敏感性
背风面结冰主要源于水膜输运而非直接撞击
叶尖升阻比降低高达80%
articles.engineeringImpact: 揭示了旋转叶片全覆冰的空间分布规律和关键敏感参数，为冰预警、分区防除冰设计和运行控制提供了定量依据，有助于提升寒冷及海上风机的安全性和效率。

paperDetails.objective: 研究旋转状态下风机叶片全覆冰的空间特性、气动退化参数敏感性及背风面结冰机理
paperDetails.methods: Fluent与FENSAP-ICE耦合数值框架，移动参考系和动网格技术，响应面法
paperDetails.operatingConditions: -10°C，参数化转速、来流速度、液态水含量和平均体积直径

articles.title: On particle dynamics in steady axial rotor flows
articles.snippet: We investigate the effect of rotor velocity induction on the distribution of particles impinging on rotor blades and model the delayed response of a particle to the rotor-induced velocity field. We consider as reference a wind turbine rotor and a small-scale propeller in axial flow conditions. We first show that the classical two-dimensional (2-D) modelling of the multiphase flow can generate a systematic error with respect to the three-dimensional (3-D) solution. We consider two limiting cases: particles in equilibrium with the rotor-induced velocity field, where the carrier phase is computed using the section’s aerodynamic velocity vector, and induction-independent particles, where the geometric velocity vector is used. The 3-D solution differs from the two limiting cases when particles are in partial equilibrium with the induced velocity. We introduce an induction Stokes number italic Stk Subscript italic ind <mml:math xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:mnf="http://cambridge.org/core/manifest" xmlns:cup="http://contentservices.cambridge.org" xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:m="http://cambridge.org/core/metadata" xmlns:core="http://cambridge.org/core" xmlns:c="http://cambridge.org/core/content"> <mml:msub> <mml:mrow> <mml:mrow> <mml:mtext mathvariant="italic" class="MJX-tex-mathit">Stk</mml:mtext> </mml:mrow> </mml:mrow> <mml:mrow> <mml:mrow> <mml:mtext mathvariant="italic" class="MJX-tex-mathit">ind</mml:mtext> </mml:mrow> </mml:mrow> </mml:msub> </mml:math> ${\textit{Stk}}_{\textit{ind}}$ and identify a transition regime between the two limiting solutions for 0.1 less than or equivalent to italic Stk Subscript italic ind Baseline less than or equivalent to 10 <mml:math xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" xmlns:mnf="http://cambridge.org/core/manifest" xmlns:cup="http://contentservices.cambridge.org" xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:m="http://cambridge.org/core/metadata" xmlns:core="http://cambridge.org/
articles.titleZh: 稳态轴向转子流中粒子动力学研究
articles.summary: 研究了转子速度诱导对撞击叶片粒子分布的影响，并建模粒子对诱导速度场的延迟响应。以风机转子和小型螺旋桨为参考，在轴向流条件下，发现经典二维多相流模型相对于三维解存在系统误差。考虑两种极限情况：粒子与诱导速度场平衡（使用截面气动速度矢量）和与诱导无关（使用几何速度矢量）。当粒子处于部分平衡时，三维解与两种极限不同。引入诱导斯托克斯数Stk_ind，识别出0.1≤Stk_ind≤10的过渡区间。
keyPoints: 经典二维模型在粒子分布预测中存在系统误差
定义了诱导斯托克斯数Stk_ind
识别了部分平衡状态下的过渡区间0.1≤Stk_ind≤10
articles.engineeringImpact: 为风机叶片粒子撞击分布的精确预测提供了理论模型，有助于优化叶片抗侵蚀设计和气动性能评估，尤其适用于多相流环境。

paperDetails.objective: 研究转子速度诱导对粒子撞击分布的影响及粒子延迟响应
paperDetails.methods: 三维数值模拟，引入诱导斯托克斯数
paperDetails.testObject: 风机转子和小型螺旋桨

articles.title: Physics-informed end-to-end fault diagnosis for rolling bearings under time-varying speed and variable load via multi-constraint IVMD and dual-branch sparse attention network
articles.snippet: Rolling bearings operating under coupled variable-load and time-varying-speed (VL-TV) conditions generate vibration signals with pronounced non-stationarity, speed-dependent impulse spacing, and strong noise contamination, which weaken both decomposition-based and purely data-driven diagnosis methods. To address this issue, this study proposes a physics-informed end-to-end diagnosis framework that integrates Multi-Constraint Improved Variational Mode Decomposition (MC-IVMD) with a Dual-Branch Cross-Layer Fusion Sparse Attention Network (CLSAM++). MC-IVMD introduces fault-mechanism-guided frequency priors, impact sparsity, modal orthogonality, and multi-scale residual feedback to determine the modal number adaptively and extract fault-sensitive intrinsic mode functions with reduced mode aliasing. CLSAM++ combines a local feature branch and a temporal dependency branch based on gated sparse-attention LSTM to jointly model impulsive local signatures and long-range temporal dependencies. The core novelty lies in coupling the physics-informed decomposition loss and bearing-fault physical consistency constraints with the classifier training objective, thereby enabling mutual optimization between signal decomposition and deep feature learning rather than a conventional serial pipeline. Experiments on the University of Ottawa VL-TV bearing dataset and a synthetic CWRU VL-TV dataset demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves 98.9 % accuracy on the 12-condition Ottawa task and 97.2 % mean accuracy on the synthetic CWRU VL-TV task, while remaining statistically superior to competing models in repeated trials ( <mml:math xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML"> <mml:mi>p</mml:mi> <mml:mo><</mml:mo> </mml:math> 0.05). These results indicate that the proposed framework is accurate, robust, and promising for real-time intelligent monitoring of rotating machinery.
articles.titleZh: 基于物理信息端到端的变转速变载荷滚动轴承故障诊断：多约束IVMD与双分支稀疏注意力网络
articles.summary: 针对变载荷-变转速工况下滚动轴承振动信号非平稳、噪声强的问题，提出物理信息端到端诊断框架，集成多约束改进变分模态分解（MC-IVMD）与双分支跨层融合稀疏注意力网络（CLSAM++）。MC-IVMD引入故障机理引导的频率先验、冲击稀疏性、模态正交性和多尺度残差反馈，自适应确定模态数并提取敏感本征模态函数。CLSAM++结合局部特征分支和基于门控稀疏注意力LSTM的时间依赖分支。核心创新在于将物理信息分解损失和轴承故障物理一致性约束与分类器训练目标耦合，实现信号分解与深度特征学习的互优化。在渥太华大学VL-TV数据集上准确率98.9%，在合成CWRU VL-TV任务上平均准确率97.2%，统计显著优于对比模型（p<0.05）。
keyPoints: MC-IVMD引入故障机理引导的频率先验和冲击稀疏性
CLSAM++结合局部特征和门控稀疏注意力LSTM
物理信息分解损失与分类器训练目标耦合
渥太华数据集准确率98.9%，合成CWRU数据集97.2%
articles.engineeringImpact: 为变工况滚动轴承提供高精度鲁棒诊断方案，可集成于实时智能监测系统，提升旋转机械运维效率，减少非计划停机。

paperDetails.objective: 解决变载荷-变转速下滚动轴承故障诊断难题
paperDetails.methods: MC-IVMD与CLSAM++结合的物理信息端到端框架
paperDetails.testObject: 滚动轴承（渥太华大学VL-TV数据集和合成CWRU VL-TV数据集）

quantitativeFindings.comparison: 统计显著优于对比模型

limitations: 未提及实际工业现场验证

articles.title: Analytical Formulation and Equilibrium Structure of a 26-State Nonlinear Dynamical System for DFIG
articles.snippet: We formulate and analyze a 26-dimensional nonlinear dynamical system governing a doubly-fed induction generator (DFIG) wind energy conversion system coupled to an infinite bus through a dynamic transmission line. Seven interacting subsystems—aerodynamics, a two-mass drivetrain, a fourth-order machine, rotor- and grid-side converter controllers, a phase-locked loop, and a pitch regulator—are assembled into a single vector field x˙=f(x,u) on R26, derived in dimensionless coordinates. Strict positivity of the determinant Δ=LsLr−Lm2=σLsLr for every physically admissible machine renders the flux–current map invertible, so the right-hand side is well defined; the nodal Kirchhoff constraint forms a semi-explicit differential-algebraic relation that we eliminate to obtain an explicit ordinary differential equation. The central contribution is a constructive scheme for the equilibria: the 26 stationarity conditions f(x★,u)=0 are solved by an iterative voltage-matching procedure converging to a residual below 10−11 per unit—essentially machine precision—which removes the spurious start-up transients common in reported simulations. Analytically chosen feedback gains induce a hierarchy of well-separated time scales, placing the closed loop in the multiple-time-scale class; the separation is made quantitative through explicit small parameters εi formed from the ratios of subsystem time constants. Numerical integration of a GE 3.6 MW configuration confirms the construction: under stationary forcing, the rotor speed stays within 1.32×10−5 pu of the equilibrium, and under a large-amplitude wind program (11→14→9 m/s) spanning the full operating envelope, it is regulated to within 0.065%, while the DC-link voltage deviation remains below 2.4×10−5 pu and the power balance closes with residual below 10−3 pu, the ≈2% mechanical–electrical gap being the modeled losses. Linearization about the computed equilibrium yields a Jacobian whose spectrum lies entirely in the open left half-plane,
articles.titleZh: 双馈感应发电机26状态非线性动力系统的解析公式与平衡结构
articles.summary: 本文构建并分析了双馈感应发电机(DFIG)风电系统耦合动态输电线的26维非线性动力学模型，包含气动、两质量传动链、四阶电机、转子侧和网侧变流器控制器、锁相环及桨距调节七个子系统。通过无量纲坐标推导出显式常微分方程，并提出一种迭代电压匹配方法求解26个平衡条件，残差低于10⁻¹¹ pu。对GE 3.6 MW机组仿真验证：稳态下转子转速偏差1.32×10⁻⁵ pu，大范围风速变化(11→14→9 m/s)下转速调节精度0.065%，直流母线电压偏差低于2.4×10⁻⁵ pu，功率平衡残差低于10⁻³ pu。线性化后雅可比矩阵特征值全部位于左半平面。证据来自数学推导和数值仿真，结论限于所建模型和参数。
keyPoints: 模型包含7个子系统共26维状态变量
平衡点求解残差低于10⁻¹¹ pu
稳态转子转速偏差1.32×10⁻⁵ pu
大范围风速变化下转速调节精度0.065%
线性化雅可比矩阵特征值全部在左半平面
articles.engineeringImpact: 该解析建模方法可消除仿真中的虚假启动瞬态，提高DFIG风电系统动态仿真精度；多时间尺度分离设计有助于控制器参数整定，对风电机组并网稳定性分析和控制优化具有工程指导意义。

paperDetails.objective: 构建并分析DFIG风电系统的26维非线性动力学模型，提出平衡点解析求解方法。
paperDetails.methods: 无量纲坐标推导、迭代电压匹配法、多时间尺度分析、数值仿真。
paperDetails.operatingConditions: 稳态及大范围风速变化(11→14→9 m/s)
limitations: 模型假设为无限大电网
未考虑实际风况随机性

articles.title: A 3D vision-based method for turbine blade crown cladding area recognition and automatic path planning
articles.snippet: Turbine blades are critical aero-engine components whose crowns frequently require wear-resistant cladding. However, manual operations are hindered by small target areas and stringent precision requirements, while traditional robotic teach-playback methods suffer from inherently low efficiency. To eliminate the reliance on manual programming, this study proposes a novel, automated 3D vision-based framework for precise cladding area extraction and path planning on turbine blade crowns. The methodology introduces an adaptive Genetic Algorithm-Particle Swarm Optimization (GA-APSO) equipped with a geometry-tailored fitness function to mitigate local optima during coarse point cloud registration. To ensure extreme boundary fidelity, a Robust Edge-Constrained Iterative Closest Point (RE-ICP) algorithm is developed for fine registration, enabling accurate area extraction via the Convex Hull algorithm. Subsequently, a comprehensive path planning pipeline is established. By integrating Principal Component Analysis (PCA) for spatial segmentation and posture determination with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) for path segment fitting, the system autonomously synthesizes continuous zigzag trajectories. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves high-precision spatial alignment and robust, teaching-free path planning. Specifically, the algorithm yields an average Root Mean Square Error (RMSE) of 0.1960 mm and a total execution time of 5789 ms, significantly outperforming alternative methods. This performance satisfies the practical requirements for precision part cladding.
articles.titleZh: 基于三维视觉的涡轮叶片冠部熔覆区域识别与自动路径规划方法
articles.summary: 针对涡轮叶片冠部耐磨熔覆依赖人工或示教效率低的问题，提出基于3D视觉的自动框架。采用自适应遗传算法-粒子群优化(GA-APSO)进行粗配准，避免局部最优；开发鲁棒边缘约束迭代最近点(RE-ICP)算法实现精配准，通过凸包算法提取熔覆区域。路径规划结合主成分分析(PCA)进行空间分割和姿态确定，奇异值分解(SVD)拟合路径段，生成连续之字形轨迹。实验表明：平均均方根误差(RMSE)为0.1960 mm，总执行时间5789 ms，满足精密零件熔覆要求。证据来自实验数据，结论限于所提算法和测试条件。
keyPoints: GA-APSO算法用于粗配准避免局部最优
RE-ICP算法实现精配准保证边界精度
平均RMSE为0.1960 mm
总执行时间5789 ms
路径规划生成连续之字形轨迹
articles.engineeringImpact: 该自动化方法消除了人工编程需求，显著提升涡轮叶片熔覆效率与精度，适用于航空发动机维修和再制造领域，可推广至其他精密零件表面处理。

paperDetails.objective: 开发基于3D视觉的涡轮叶片冠部熔覆区域自动识别与路径规划方法。
paperDetails.methods: GA-APSO粗配准、RE-ICP精配准、凸包算法、PCA、SVD。
limitations: 算法计算时间可能随复杂度增加

articles.title: Optical properties of CdSe nanoparticles
articles.snippet: We report on the optical properties of CdSe nanoparticles (NPs) in water (content change between 5 and 95 % with a step of 5 %). Optical transmission, reflection, refractive index and extinction coefficient were calculated with the transfer-matrix (TM) method. All estimated optical properties were analysed between 300 and 1000 nm in the spectral region. Optical dielectric functions (ε1 and ε2) were obtained from spectral behaviour refractive index and extinction coefficient. The high-frequency dielectric constant, the ratio of the carrier density to the effective mass of the carrier, and relaxation time were obtained from the spectral behaviour of the optical dielectric functions.
articles.titleZh: CdSe纳米颗粒的光学性质
articles.summary: 本文报道了水中CdSe纳米颗粒（浓度5%-95%，步长5%）的光学性质。采用传输矩阵法计算了300-1000 nm光谱范围内的透射率、反射率、折射率和消光系数，并由此得到光学介电函数（ε1和ε2）。进一步从介电函数光谱行为获得了高频介电常数、载流子密度与有效质量之比以及弛豫时间。该研究为CdSe纳米颗粒在光电器件中的应用提供了基础光学参数。
keyPoints: CdSe纳米颗粒浓度变化范围为5%至95%
采用传输矩阵法计算光学参数
光谱范围300-1000 nm
获得了光学介电函数及高频介电常数等参数
articles.engineeringImpact: 该研究为CdSe纳米颗粒在光伏、光电探测器等器件中的光学设计提供了基础参数，有助于优化器件性能。

articles.summary: 本文针对风电齿轮箱在非马尔可夫和非平稳载荷转换下的相依失效问题，提出了一种贝叶斯动态可靠性评估方法。该方法能够处理载荷转换的非平稳性和失效相依性，为齿轮箱的可靠性分析提供了新途径。

articles.title: Stability Implications of Renewable Energy Integration in Interconnected Power Systems
articles.snippet: This paper investigates the impact of renewable energy source (RES) integration on the small-signal stability of interconnected power systems using linear modal analysis. Unlike conventional synchronous generators, inverter-based RESs are non-dispatchable and do not inherently contribute rotational inertia or governor-based damping. Their increasing penetration consequently degrades system frequency response, leading to a higher rate of change of frequency (RoCoF) and a lower frequency nadir following disturbances. Modal analysis reveals that both interarea and local electromechanical oscillation modes experience reduced damping as RES penetration levels rise. Furthermore, wind power integration introduces a distinct low-frequency interarea oscillatory mode not observed with equivalent photovoltaic (PV) integration. A modified Kundur two-area test system is employed to model these scenarios, wherein wind and solar farms progressively replace conventional synchronous generation to evaluate their influence on system dynamic stability.

evidence.publisher: World Scientific and Engineering Academy and Society

reliability.label: 高可靠
factors: 发表在WSEAS TRANSACTIONS ON POWER SYSTEMS

articles.titleZh: 可再生能源并网对互联电力系统稳定性的影响
articles.summary: 本文采用线性模态分析法研究可再生能源并网对互联电力系统小信号稳定性的影响。逆变器型可再生能源不具备同步发电机的惯性和阻尼，高渗透率导致频率响应恶化，扰动后频率变化率增大、最低点降低。模态分析表明，随着可再生能源渗透率上升，区间和本地机电振荡模式阻尼均减小。风电并网引入了一种光伏并网中未出现的低频区间振荡模式。研究采用修改的Kundur两区域测试系统，逐步用风电场和光伏电站替代同步发电机以评估动态稳定性影响。证据来源于仿真模型，结论基于线性化分析，未涉及非线性或暂态稳定性。
keyPoints: 逆变器型可再生能源不提供惯性和阻尼
高渗透率导致频率变化率增大和最低点降低
风电引入低频区间振荡模式，光伏未出现
articles.engineeringImpact: 对电力系统规划与运行有重要启示：需重新评估高比例可再生能源下的频率稳定和振荡阻尼，可能要求附加控制策略或储能设备以补偿惯性和阻尼缺失。

paperDetails.objective: 研究可再生能源并网对互联电力系统小信号稳定性的影响
paperDetails.testObject: 修改的Kundur两区域测试系统
paperDetails.operatingConditions: 逐步用风电场和光伏电站替代同步发电机
limitations: 基于线性化分析，未考虑非线性效应
仅针对小信号稳定性，未涉及暂态稳定性
仿真模型为简化两区域系统，实际系统可能更复杂
